speaker: Elder Mira
text: The Ashen Ruin has begun to flare again. Our Sunstone was taken deeper into the vault. Bring it back before night turns against us.

speaker: Elder Mira
text: Take the eastern road through the Greenwild. The ruin gate still answers the old watch sigils.

speaker: Elder Mira
text: The Greenwild is restless, and the ruin guards wake again. Bring me the Sunstone and we can hold the line.

speaker: Elder Mira
text: The Sunstone's light returns with you. Place it here, and let Emberfall breathe again.

speaker: Elder Mira
text: Well done. The wards are steady, and the town will remember who stood when the ruin stirred.

speaker: Iora the Hearthkeeper
text: Hold still. The road only gets crueler once the pines thin out.

speaker: Benn of the Watch Market
text: If you're headed into the Greenwild, take one tonic from my personal crate. Consider it an investment in seeing you come back.

options.label: Save it for someone worse off.

speaker: Benn of the Watch Market
text: The road east has teeth. Strike first, keep moving, and don't waste your tonic when Iora can still mend you for free.

speaker: Tamsin the Scout
text: The ruin guardian hits hard, but it still thinks like a soldier. Step in, strike, then keep circling before it pins you.
